Oracc: CAMS/GKAB — CAMS Geography of Knowledge Corpus

SpTU 5, 289 [loan of arable land][via cams/gkab]

Obverse
o 1o 1

1(AŠ) GUR 2(BARIG) 1(BAN₂) ŠE.BAR ŠE.BAL ša₂ ZU₂.LUM.MA

(o 1) 1 kurru 2 pānu 1 sūtu of barley in exchange for the dates, (are) rest of the tenancy dues of the field of Ubar, son of Anu-ahhe-iqiša, incumbent on Anu-reʾušunu, son of Tattannu and Nihistu, son of Anu-belšunu.

o 22

re-⸢eḫ⸣-tu₄ ZA₃.LU A.ŠA₃ ša₂ mu₂-bar

o 33

DUMU ša₂ mda-nu—ŠEŠ-MEŠ—BAša₂ ina muḫ-ḫi

o 44

mda-nu—SIPA-šu₂-nu DUMU ša₂ mtat-tan-nu

o 55

u mni-ḫi-is-tu₄ DUMU ša₂ mda-nu—⸢EN?⸣-[šu₂?-nu?]

o 66

ina itiGU₄ ŠE.BAR a₄ 1(AŠ) GUR 2!(BARIG) 1(BAN₂)

(o 6) They will give, in the month Ayyaru, this barley of 1 kurru 1! pānu 1 sūtu, in Uruk.

o 77

ina UNUGki i-nam-din-ʾ pu-[ut]

(o 7) They stand security mutually for the payment.

o 88

a-ḫa-miš a-na KAR na-⸢šu⸣-[u₂]

o 99

e-lat ša₂ 1(BARIG) u 3 SILA₃ ŠE.⸢BAR⸣ [...]

(o 9) They will give additionally 1 pānu and 3 qû [...] capital which (is) at their disposal ... [...] local tariff of Uruk [...].

Bottom
b.e. 1b.e. 1

SAG.DU ša₂ ina IGI-šu₂-nu ⸢ŠA₃⸣ [...]

b.e. 22

ni-is-ḫi ša₂ UNUGki x [...] i-nam-din-⸢ʾ⸣

Reverse
r 1r 1

lu₂mu-kin₇ mla-a-⸢ba⸣-[ši ...]

(r 1) Witnesses: Labaši [...], son of Anu-uballiṭ; [PN], son of Anu-balassu-iqbi; Labaši, son of ... [...]; Labaši, son of Nidintu-Anu.

r 22

DUMU ša₂ mda-nu—DIN⸢iṭ⸣ [...]

r 33

DUMU ša₂ mda-nu—DIN-su—[E ...]

r 44

mla-ba-ši DUMU ša₂ mx-x-[...]

r 55

mla-ba-ši DUMU ša₂ mni-din-tu₂—da-nu

r 66

ŠE.NUMUN ša₂ EN?-šu₂? ŠE.NUMUN ša₂ <m>u₂-bar

(r 6) The arable land of the owner (is) the arable land of Ubar. A cow is a deposit before him [...]. Other belongings concerning the arable land until the barley of Ubar [...]

r 77

1 bu-uš-<tu> maš-ka-nu ina IGI-šu₂ [...]

r 88

TUKUu₂ ša₂-nam-ma ana muḫ-ḫi ŠE.NUMUN a-di mu₂-bar ⸢ŠE.BAR⸣ [...]

r 99

mda-nu—NUMUN—MU lu₂DUB.SAR <DUMU ša₂ m>da-nu—[ŠEŠ?-MEŠ?—MU?]

(r 9) Anu-zer-iddin, the scribe, <son of> [Anu-ahhe-iddin]. At Uruk, the month Ṭebetu, 13th day, 8th year of Darius, king of all the lands.

r 1010

UNUGki itiAB U₄ 13-KAM₂

Top
t.e. 1t.e. 1

MU 8-KAM₂ mda-ra-muš LUGAL KUR.KUR

t.e. 22

u mdUTU—ŠEŠ-MEŠ—MU

(t.e. 2) and Šamaš-ahhe-iddin.

Left
l.e. 1l.e. 1

ṣu-pur-šu₂-nu

(l.e. 1) their nails.
